message:
test(core): relaxed error message assertion and behavioral cancellation contract tests

runtime.rs: Relax pane_tiered_scrollback_fetch_treats_missing_summary_as_blind_error
test to use contains() assertions instead of exact string match, since
the error message format may vary between backends.

vendored_async_contract_behavioral.rs: Three new behavioral contract
tests for explicit-Cx cancellation through the public MuxPool API:

- B23w: get_lines_with_cx cancellation — warms a pooled connection via
  handshake, then verifies a cancelled Cx surfaces PoolError::Cancelled
  without sending a post-handshake request.
- B23x: write_to_pane_with_cx cancellation — same pattern for write.
- B23y: send_paste_with_cx cancellation — same pattern for paste.

Each test spins up a mock mux server that tracks protocol messages,
completes a warm-up handshake, then proves the cancelled operation
does not produce additional server-side traffic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
